landing.hero_title: MDRank — Medical devices, ranked by evidence
landing.hero_body: We are rebuilding MDRank around exact-model identity, traceable evidence, deterministic scoring, and human-approved publication.

sections.heading: Evidence before rankings
sections.body: Legacy placeholder scores have been removed while exact-model records and category methodology are verified.

sections.heading: Blood-pressure depth first
sections.body: The initial 90-day program prioritizes home blood-pressure monitors before expansion into additional categories.
